docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, JUSTO (DRIVER) AS TO DEFENDANT WOLDE, EYASU (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, JUSTO (DRIVER) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLDE, EYASU (DRIVER) $2,340.69 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT WOLDE, EYASU (DRIVER)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED APR-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WOLDE, EYASU (DRIVER)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER KARINA MCMILLAN-REA. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
